summary: Full end-to-end testing of Bright Vision Infotech educational landing page (frontend + backend). All backend APIs (6/6) pass, all critical frontend flows (homepage load, navigation, contact form submission, WhatsApp link, social links, footer, mobile responsive) verified. No blocking bugs found.

minor.issue: Email sending is MOCKED (no Resend API key configured) - submissions return status='stored_only'. Expected per task description.

action_items: When deploying to production, configure RESEND_API_KEY, SENDER_EMAIL and INSTITUTE_EMAIL env vars in /app/backend/.env so contact form emails are actually delivered (currently only stored in DB).
critical_code_review_comments: server.py: Uses deprecated FastAPI @app.on_event('shutdown'); consider migrating to lifespan context manager.
ContactSection.jsx: Loads axios globally and reads REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL at module scope (fine for CRA, but consider centralising API client).
HomePage.jsx: Both BookOpenAnimation onComplete and the 1500ms setTimeout set showContent(true). Redundant but harmless.
Backend contact endpoint does not validate phone/email format beyond Pydantic defaults (email is Optional[str], not EmailStr). Consider EmailStr for email field.
No server-side rate limiting on /api/contact - potential spam risk in production.
test_credentials: Not applicable - no auth required for this app
seed_data_creation: Test contact form submissions prefixed with TEST_ created in MongoDB contact_submissions collection during testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: App is a static educational landing page with a single backend endpoint /api/contact. WhatsApp number 9811810364 is correctly wired in both WhatsAppButton (fixed FAB) and ContactSection+Footer social links. Instagram/LinkedIn links point to https://instagram.com/brightvisioninfotech and https://linkedin.com/company/brightvisioninfotech. Contact form integration working: POST /api/contact persists, returns 200 with status 'stored_only' (Resend not configured). Mobile nav works via [data-testid=mobile-menu-button] and [data-testid=mobile-nav-*]. Run: pytest /app/backend/tests/test_contact_api.py -v
